PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?bookLabel WHERE {
  ?book wdt:P50 wd:Q4402038 ; wdt:P179 ?series ; wdt:P1545 ?volume ; rdfs:label ?bookLabel .
  ?series rdfs:label ?seriesLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?bookLabel) = 'en' && LANG(?seriesLabel) = 'en')
  .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?seriesLabel) , 'lunar chronicles'))
  .
}
ORDER BY ?volume
LIMIT 1
OFFSET 2
